phrases.intent_en: Ask how to cross to Borgo Trento from the historic centre
phrases.text_local: Scusi, come si raggiunge il Borgo Trento dal centro?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, KOH-meh see raj-JOO-njeh eel BOR-goh TREN-toh dal CHEN-troh?
phrases.cultural_note: Borgo Trento is Verona's quiet residential neighbourhood across the Adige River — peaceful and away from tourist crowds.

responses.english: From Ponte Pietra, cross the river on foot.
responses.phonetic: dal PON-teh PYEH-trah, at-trah-VER-sah eel FYOO-meh ah PYEH-dee.
responses.local: Dal Ponte Pietra, attraversa il fiume a piedi.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Teatro Romano is
phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dov'è il Teatro Romano di Verona?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, doh-VEH eel teh-AH-troh roh-MAH-noh dee veh-ROH-nah?

responses.english: On the San Pietro hill, above Ponte Pietra.
responses.phonetic: sool KOL-leh dee san PYEH-troh, SOH-prah eel PON-teh PYEH-trah.
responses.local: Sul colle di San Pietro, sopra il Ponte Pietra.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if the funicular to the Castel San Pietro is running
phrases.text_local: Scusi, funziona la funicolare per il Castel San Pietro?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, foon-TSYOH-nah lah foo-nee-koh-LAH-reh per eel KAS-tel san PYEH-troh?

responses.english: Yes, it departs from the riverside, every twenty minutes.
responses.phonetic: see, PAR-teh dal loon-gah-DEE-jeh, ON-nyee VEN-tee mee-NOO-tee.
responses.local: Sì, parte dal lungadige, ogni venti minuti.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to get a panoramic view of Verona
phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dov'è il punto panoramico migliore su Verona?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, doh-VEH eel POON-toh pah-noh-RAH-mee-koh meel-YOH-reh soo veh-ROH-nah?

responses.english: From Castel San Pietro, view of the whole city.
responses.phonetic: dal KAS-tel san PYEH-troh, VEES-tah soo TOOT-tah lah cheet-TAH.
responses.local: Dal Castel San Pietro, vista su tutta la città.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if there are good restaurants in Borgo Trento
phrases.text_local: Scusi, ci sono ristoranti tipici nel Borgo Trento?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, chee SOH-noh rees-toh-RAN-tee TEE-pee-chee nel BOR-goh TREN-toh?

responses.english: Yes, a few local trattorias, less touristy than the centre.
responses.phonetic: see, KWAL-keh trat-toh-REE-ah loh-KAH-leh, MEH-noh too-REES-tee-kah del CHEN-troh.
responses.local: Sì, qualche trattoria locale, meno turistica del centro.
